summary: Tested UI overlap resolution changes: 1) Enterprise Live Dashboard now has 3 tabs (Mesajlasma removed), 2) Platform Scaling has 4 tabs (Revenue ML removed), 3) Analitik & Raporlar has 3 tabs including new Revenue ML tab, 4) Standalone Messaging Dashboard works independently. All 7 test requirements passed.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being 0 or -1 - charts may not render properly on initial load
Console warnings about chart width/height being 0 - charts may need explicit dimensions

critical_code_review_comments: Chart components in RevenueMLPanel.jsx and PlatformScalingDashboard.jsx show console warnings about width/height being 0 or -1. Consider adding explicit minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components to prevent these warnings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI overlap resolution completed. Enterprise Live at /enterprise-live has 3 tabs (Canli Operasyon, Oto-Fiyatlama, Entegrasyonlar). Platform Scaling at /platform-scaling has 4 tabs (Genel Bakis, Event Mimari, Multi-Property, CompSet Analiz) with ML Ozet summary card in Overview. Analitik & Raporlar at /app/analitik has 3 tabs (Revenue ML, Rapor Disa Aktarma, ML Zamanlayici). Standalone Messaging Dashboard at /messaging-dashboard has 7 tabs.
